title: funastrum pallidum
intro: Funastrum pallidum, also known as Coralillo, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its yellowish flowers and hairy stem. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. Funastrum pallidum has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Funastrum pallidum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
